═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
PHASE 5 VALIDATION — run these commands to verify scaffold
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

  pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
  pnpm tools:validate-inputs
  pnpm tools:check-env
  pnpm tools:check-product-sync
  pnpm lint
  pnpm typecheck
  pnpm test
  pnpm build
  pnpm audit --audit-level=high

All 9 must pass before Phase 6 (Docker services startup).
Trigger Phase 5: say "Start Phase 5" in a new Claude Code session.
